title: Armor Stand Hitbox Remover
description: Removes armor stands / htiboxes So you wont get trapped. Meaning you can pearl eat place blocks etc.
body:
# **Armor Stand Hitbox Remover**

- This mod removes the hitbox of armor stands in Minecraft, allowing players to interact with the world and entities more smoothly without accidentally colliding with or selecting armor stands.
  
# **Features:**

* Completely disables the collision and interaction box around armor stands.

* Improves player movement and interaction near armor stands.

* Lightweight and easy to install, with minimal performance impact.

# **Why download?**

-  Perfect for players and map creators seeking a cleaner, less obstructive experience around decorative armor stands.
  
-  Especially useful in builds, museums, and display areas where armor stands are used decoratively but can interfere with gameplay.
  
- To escape armor stand traps.

# **How to use:**
- Plop into your minecraft folder
- Make sure to have fabric api
- Make sure to toggle/enable the mod using /togglearmorstand

# **Compatibility**
This mod should work for 1.20 And above. If not please contact me on discord my discord username is Cheatingss.
